headline: 2 Reasons JBL is Risky and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: What a time it’s been for Jabil. In the past six months alone, the company’s stock price has increased by a massive 69.9%, reaching $371.50 per share. This was partly due to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.

headline: Electronic Components & Manufacturing Stocks Q1 Highlights: Jabil (NYSE:JBL)
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Jabil (NYSE:JBL) and the rest of the electronic components & manufacturing stocks fared in Q1.

headline: Kinaxis Unveils 2026 Customer Award Winners at Kinexions in Las Vegas
summary: LAS VEGAS, June 04, 2026--Kinaxis® (TSX: KXS), a global leader in end-to-end supply chain planning and orchestration, today announced the winners of its 2026 Customer Awards. Now in their eighth year, these awards were celebrated live at Kinexions North America, the flagship premiere global conference hosted by Kinaxis, bringing together supply chain leaders from around the world.
